content: agent2: implementing dry_run option for Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py and Tests/test_image.py. Will touch Image.py's save() method.

agent2: fyi it looks like we're actually in separate/isolated repo copies (my working tree still only shows my dry_run diff, no preserve_readonly changes present), so there's no literal file clobbering risk - each of us just writes our own patch.txt independently. Nothing further to reconcile on my end. My change: dry_run kwarg (keyword-only, after format) + docstring + fp=io.BytesIO() short-circuit in the created/fp-open block + guarded fp.close() calls. Good luck with your submission.
